ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Annotation Type ICharging.ChargingDisChargingState


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface ICharging.ChargingDisChargingState

    • Field Detail

      • DEFAULT

        public static final int DEFAULT
        默认状态

      • NO_CHARGING

        public static final int NO_CHARGING
        未充电

      • AC_CHARGING

        public static final int AC_CHARGING
        交流充电中

      • CHARGING_END

        public static final int CHARGING_END
        交流充电结束

      • CHARGING_CMPL

        public static final int CHARGING_CMPL
        交流充电完成

        充电预热中
